response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, but lacks the executive leadership, team-scaling experience, and deep background in algorithmic fintech and production multi-agent AI required for this CTO role.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems engineering experience, including handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated ability to architect event-driven platforms and microservices, as seen in the GISCollective project.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and a track record of scaling teams to 30+ people.
Missing domain expertise in real-time credit risk, margin optimization, and algorithmic working-capital management.
Does not possess the required multi-year production experience building and operating complex multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes environments.
